addressed_weaknesses: B1 (major): AUROC convention is now explicit (§3.5) and the symmetric-equivalent raw-cosine baselines are reported in Table 1 footnote with a one-sentence justification of the directional comparison.
C-F2 (DE): predictor domain corrected from ℝ^d → ℝ^d to 𝕊^(d-1) → ℝ^d.
C-F5 (DE): label convention (y=1 changing, y=0 stable, no sign flip) inserted in §3 right after eq. score, plus deployment-orientation argument.
C-F8 (UC): 'no transform type shared' replaced with 'no operation–parameter-band combination shared'; JPEG explicitly called out as the recurring operation with disjoint quality bands.

B2: 'rules out any medical-image pretraining' softened to 'rules out PMC-15M-style biomedical-figure pretraining at PMC-15M's undocumented dermatology fraction' across abstract, §1, §1 contributions, §5, §7. PMC-15M dermatology fraction is now explicitly flagged as undocumented.
B3: 'two architectures' → 'two pretraining paradigms within the ViT-B class' in abstract.
C-F1: 𝒳 ⊂ [0,1]^{3×H×W} defined on first use.
C-F3: train/eval normalisation asymmetry now stated, with the loss expansion that drives prediction direction toward z(x_t) and norm toward 1; cross-reference to Appendix E (norm mean ≥ 0.97).
C-F4: soft-regulariser equilibrium argument added (||W − I||_F at equilibrium set by data-gradient/λ balance).
C-F6: bootstrap unstratified-by-label note added to Appendix D, with the per-resample class-balance drift estimate.
C-F7: collapse-check minima now defined precisely in symbols.
C-F10: tilde-g_θ promoted to a numbered display equation (eq. gtilde) so §7 can reference.
deferred: Agent-A observation on +0.62 vs +0.6149: rounding-up convention; left as +0.62 since the abstract is for non-precision-critical context. Exact value remains in locked-numbers.json.
actions_taken: §3.1: 𝒳 definition; predictor domain corrected; train/eval normalisation paragraph; soft-regulariser equilibrium note; tilde-g_θ promoted to numbered display; AUROC label convention plus deployment justification.
§3.3: rephrased disjointness claim; called out JPEG as recurring with disjoint q-bands.
§3.5 (now within §3): AUROC convention sentence + directional vs symmetric note.
Abstract: 'two architectures' → 'two pretraining paradigms within the ViT-B class'; baseline list narrowed to convention-stable pixel-L2.
§1 contributions and intro: B2 scope softening on the BiomedCLIP partition.
§5 EXP-008 paragraph: B2 softening with PMC-15M dermatology-fraction caveat.
§7 dermlip-vs-biomedclip: B2 softening, added explicit 'PMC-15M's dermatology fraction is undocumented' caveat.

Table 1 caption: appended a directional-vs-symmetric AUROC clarification with the four symmetric-equivalent raw-cosine values (DermLIP 0.891, OpenAI CLIP 0.964, BiomedCLIP 0.953, DINOv2 ViT-B/14 0.726).
Appendix E: collapse-check minima formal definitions.
